message:
feat(crash): implement crash hook and crash bundle writer

Replace the placeholder install_panic_hook() with a working implementation
that writes redacted crash bundles on panic.  Bundles are written atomically
(temp dir + rename) to .wa/crash/wa_crash_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS/.

Bundle contents:
- manifest.json: version, timestamp, file list, bundle size
- crash_report.json: redacted panic message, location, backtrace, PID, thread
- health_snapshot.json: last HealthSnapshot if available

Safety properties:
- All text redacted via Redactor (strips API keys, tokens, secrets)
- Backtrace truncated to 64 KiB
- Total bundle capped at 1 MiB privacy budget
- Files written with 0o600, directories with 0o700
- Duplicate timestamps handled via counter suffix

19 new tests covering: serialization, bundle creation, redaction,
permissions, duplicate handling, manifest correctness, health snapshot
roundtrip.

Implements wa-upg.13.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
